title: COMMUNITY VOLUNTEER NETWORK - 211info
text: PACIFIC RETIREMENT SERVICES INC COMMUNITY VOLUNTEER NETWORK Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Foster Grandparents and Retired and Senior Volunteer Program (RSVP) offer opportunities to earn supplemental income (non-taxable stipend) and to help the community providing supports to older adults and children. 1 W Main Street Suite 303 Medford, OR 97501 Eligibility: Age 55 and older Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-4:30pm Email (541) 646-3300 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 646-3300 Main phone General Inquiries (541) 857-7472 Main phone Community Housing (888) 724-6424 Reception (800) 735-2900 TTY/TTD Main phone (541) 646-3300 General Inquiries (541) 857-7784 Executive Director of Community Volunteer Network Cassie Rose Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for Volunteer Application Form. Call or email for more information. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Senior Community Service Employment Programs Senior Corps Volunteer Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - AFFORDABLE HOUSING HOUSING/SHELTER - COMMUNITY HOUSING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. PACIFIC RETIREMENT SERVICES INC
